title: Diverging preload strategies on same query
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.enriched_feed/0` that returns published Posts with: (1) `:author` via struct preload (`preload: [:author]`), (2) `:category` via struct preload as well, (3) NO comments preloaded. Then use `Repo.all/1` and verify the result. The two preloads should be in a single `preload:` list. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Multiple preloads in one list — seems simple but the nuance is NOT join-preloading even the belongs_to one when mixed with other preloads is fine (keeps code uniform).
